name: Tablet – Bold Grid Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="tab-img-clip">
      <rect x="440" y="0" width="640" height="860"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: full background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: top-right image zone bg -->
  <rect x="440" y="0" width="640" height="860" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_IMG_ZONE"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: product image clipped to top-right zone -->
  <g clip-path="url(#tab-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="440" y="0" width="640" height="860" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 4: image zone border -->
  <rect x="440" y="0" width="640" height="860" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: top-left brand block — solid accent fill -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="440" height="260" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="30" y="90"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_META_LABEL</text>
  <text x="30" y="185" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" letter-spacing="0">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="30" y="218" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: mid-left product title block — dark bg -->
  <rect x="0" y="260" width="440" height="380" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"/>
  <rect x="0" y="260" width="440" height="380" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12"/>
  <text x="30" y="342" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="62" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="30" y="414" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="62" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>
  <text x="30" y="486" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="62" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE3</text>
  <line x1="30" y1="510" x2="410" y2="510" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.25"/>
  <text x="30" y="546" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="30" y="572" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE2</text>
  <rect x="30" y="598" width="156" height="34" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="108" y="620" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: bottom-left price block — solid accent fill -->
  <rect x="0" y="640" width="440" height="220" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="30" y="698" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="30" y="782" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="68" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"   letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SHORT</text>
  <text x="30" y="820" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="16" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: horizontal divider -->
  <line x1="0" y1="860" x2="1080" y2="860" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: spec tile 1 -->
  <rect x="0"   y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <rect x="0"   y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="24"  y="944" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="24"  y="984" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <text x="24"  y="1014" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"   font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_SUB</text>
  <rect x="0"   y="1060" width="270" height="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- LAYER 10: spec tile 2 -->
  <rect x="270" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"/>
  <rect x="270" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="294" y="944" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="294" y="984" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <text x="294" y="1014" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"   font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_SUB</text>
  <rect x="270" y="1060" width="270" height="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: spec tile 3 -->
  <rect x="540" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TILE_A"/>
  <rect x="540" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="564" y="944" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="564" y="984" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <text x="564" y="1014" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"   font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_SUB</text>
  <rect x="540" y="1060" width="270" height="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.4"/>

  <!-- LAYER 12: spec tile 4 -->
  <rect x="810" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"/>
  <rect x="810" y="860" width="270" height="220" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <text x="834" y="944" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="834" y="984" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="30" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT"   letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>
  <text x="834" y="1014" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"   font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.4">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_SUB</text>
  <rect x="810" y="1060" width="270" height="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: secondary divider -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1080" x2="1080" y2="1080" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 14: bottom-left color swatch zone -->
  <rect x="0" y="1080" width="440" height="270" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG"/>
  <text x="30" y="1140" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_COLORS_LABEL</text>
  <circle cx="54"  cy="1202" r="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH1"/>
  <circle cx="54"  cy="1202" r="28" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="130" cy="1202" r="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH2"/>
  <circle cx="130" cy="1202" r="28" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="206" cy="1202" r="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH3"/>
  <circle cx="206" cy="1202" r="28" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="282" cy="1202" r="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH4"/>
  <circle cx="282" cy="1202" r="28" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="54"  y="1252" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.35">PLACEHOLDER_SWATCH1_NAME</text>
  <text x="130" y="1252" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.35">PLACEHOLDER_SWATCH2_NAME</text>
  <text x="206" y="1252" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.35">PLACEHOLDER_SWATCH3_NAME</text>
  <text x="282" y="1252" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.35">PLACEHOLDER_SWATCH4_NAME</text>
  <text x="30"  y="1314" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TEXT" fill-opacity="0.2" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: bottom-right CTA block — solid accent fill -->
  <rect x="440" y="1080" width="640" height="270" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="760" y="1196" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_LINE1</text>
  <text x="760" y="1260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_LINE2</text>
  <line x1="460" y1="1310" x2="1060" y2="1310" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="760" y="1334" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_CONTACT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: corner marks -->
  <path d="M0 60 L0 0 L60 0"         fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M1080 60 L1080 0 L1020 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
